posts.title: KEN PAXTON: The Save America Act is the most important bill the U.S. Senate could ever pass, and I'm committed to helping President Trump get it done. I would consider dropping out of this race if Senate Leadership agrees to lift the filibuster and passes the SAVE America Act.

The Save America Act is the most important bill the U.S. Senate could ever pass, and I'm committed to helping President Trump get it done.

I would consider dropping out of this race if Senate Leadership agrees to lift the filibuster and passes the SAVE America Act. 

John Cornyn

posts.title: US will ‘bitterly regret’ sinking Iranian warship, foreign minister warns — as ayatollah calls for Trump’s blood. Video released by the Pentagon shows the vessel being hit by a huge explosion, which ripped apart its rear. The impact of the blast caused the ship to lift & begin sinking.

link_metadata.description: The US will “bitterly regret the precedent it has set” after an American submarine sank an Iranian warship, Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Aragchi warned Thursday.
